monad.ai / GLOBAL_BACKGROUND_SHARE

Variable: GLOBAL_BACKGROUND_SHARE ​

const GLOBAL_BACKGROUND_SHARE: 0.05 = 0.05

Defined in: kernel/adaptiveWeights.ts:39

Minimum share of every namespaced reward still attributed to the global prior.
